description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern rifle with a striking urban graffiti-inspired color scheme, featuring vivid magenta and green hues across its body. The receiver, handguard, and stock are adorned with bold, angular patterns and the word 'ANARCHY' is prominently displayed on the side. The rifle has a fixed stock, a standard-length barrel, and a detachable curved magazine, all painted in the same vibrant motif. Iron sights are mounted on the top, and the muzzle appears to have a standard flash hider. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical for modern rifles, with a hard, matte finish. This object is designed to stand out visually, likely intended for use in a contemporary or near-future urban environment.
description: A graffiti-themed AK-style rifle with vivid magenta and green colors, fixed stock, and bold urban patterns. Features include a detachable magazine, iron sights, and a standard barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and muzzle, with the vibrant color scheme visible along the top.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the 'ANARCHY' graffiti, the fixed stock, curved magazine, and the detailed magenta-green patterning.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the green buttstock and the slim profile of the rifle, with the magenta and green colors extending along the length.
description_view_3: The right-side view displays the opposite side of the rifle, showing the magazine, trigger, and the continuation of the graffiti pattern.
